error_signature: no file content or download URL in Chat Trigger output
title: Missing file content in Chat Trigger output
symptom: When using the Chat Trigger node, the output only contains file metadata without the actual file content or download URL.
applies_when: User uploads a file via chat
not_this_if: File content is present in the output
root_cause: The Chat Trigger node in n8n Cloud currently does not include the binary content of uploaded files in its output. It only provides metadata, which limits further processing of the file content in subsequent nodes.
fix_steps: Change the parameter type from 'Form Data' to 'Binary' in the Chat Trigger node settings.
Synchronize the input data field with the binary name as shown in the Binary response.
agent_instruction: Update the Chat Trigger node to use binary data instead of form data for file uploads.
